title: Codex for Open Source
description: Codex for Open Source supports maintainers of important public open-source projects with coding, review, security, and automation resources.
eligibility: Primary or core maintainers of active public open-source projects with meaningful usage, adoption, or ecosystem importance may apply and are reviewed on a rolling basis.
value: Six months of ChatGPT Pro with Codex, conditional Codex Security access, and potential API credits
